zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Edward Hurst於1480年出生在英國英格蘭奧可福爾可姆時，他的父親Sir John Hurst II20歲，母親Lady Mary Heston15歲。他和Alice Francis Chamberlin至少有6個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1539年在他的家鄉享年59歲，埋葬在澳洲維斯特 奧斯特拉利亞未知 易曼德。

nameMeanings.name: Hurst
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): topographic name for someone who lived near a wood or wooded hill, from Middle English hirst(e), herst(e), hurst(e) (Old English hyrst) or a habitational name from any of the places so called, such as Hurst Green (in Mitton, Lancashire), Hirst (Northumberland), Hurst (Berkshire, Kent, Warwickshire), Hurstpierpoint (Sussex), or Hirst in Longwood (Yorkshire).
Irish: re-Anglicized form of de Horsaigh, the Gaelicized form of the English habitational name Horsey , established in Ireland since the 13th century.
German and Swiss German (also Hürst): topographic name from Middle High German hurst ‘woodland, thicket’; or a habitational name from a place so named in Westphalia.

variants.name: Herst
meanings: English: variant of   Hurst  .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): artificial name or nickname from Polish herszt ‘ringleader, chieftain’.

variants.name: Horsey
meanings: English (southern): habitational name from Horsey Pignes (Somerset), Horse Eye (Sussex), or Horsey (Norfolk), from Old English hors ‘horse’ + ēg ‘island, low-lying land’.

variants.name: Hearst
meanings: English: variant of   Hurst  .
Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of some similar (like-sounding) original Ashkenazic surname such as   Hirsch  .

variants.name: Horst
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Phares, Alois, Armin, Fritz, Hans, Inge, Manfred, Monika, Reinhold.

North German and Dutch: topographic name from Middle Low German hurst, Middle Dutch horst ‘undergrowth, brushwood, wild place’. More specifically, the term was also used to denote a crow's or similar large bird's nest, a raised area in surrounding marshland, or an area of uncleared woodland, all of which meanings could have contributed to the surname. This surname is also a habitational name from any of numerous places called with this word. Compare Hurst .

History: As a name of German origin (see 1 above) the surname Horst is established among the American Mennonites. Their progenitors were the brothers Joseph, Michael, and Peter Horst, who came to PA in 1731 together with their widowed mother. Among their descendants the altered form Hurst is also found.

variants.name: Hirst
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): variant of   Hurst  .
German: variant of Hürst (see Hurst ).

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

variants.name: Edoardo
meanings: From English. See Edward .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Edward Hurst was born in 1480, in Combe, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John Hurst II, was 20 and his mother, Lady Mary Heston, was 15. He had at least 6 sons and 1 daughter with Alice Francis Chamberlin. He died in 1539, in his hometown, at the age of 59, and was buried in Unknown Island, Western Australia, Australia.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Edward Hurst est né en 1480, à Combe, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Hurst II, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Lady Mary Heston, avait 15 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille avec Alice Francis Chamberlin. Il est décédé en 1539, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Unknown Island, Western Australia, Australie.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Edward Hurst 1480 in Combe, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Hurst II 20 und seine Mutter Lady Mary Heston 15. Er hatte mit Alice Francis Chamberlin mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1539 im Alter von 59 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Unknown Island, Western Australia, Australien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edward Hurst è nato il nel 1480 nel Combe, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir John Hurst II, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Lady Mary Heston, aveva 15 anni. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia con Alice Francis Chamberlin. Morì nel 1539, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Unknown Island, Western Australia, Australia.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Edward Hurstが1480年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアコンベで生まれた時，父Sir John Hurst IIは20歳，母Lady Mary Hestonは15歳であった。彼はAlice Francis Chamberlinとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1539年に故郷で59歳で死去し，オーストラリアウエステルン アウストラリアウンクノウン イスランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Edward Hurst(이)가 1480년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 코브에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Hurst II(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Mary Heston(은)는 15세였다. 그는 Alice Francis Chamberlin(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1539년 그의 고향에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 오스트레일리아 웨스터 오스트라리야 노운 이슬랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edward Hurst nasceu em 1480, em Combe, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Hurst II, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Lady Mary Heston, tinha 15 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha com Alice Francis Chamberlin. Ele faleceu em 1539, em sua cidade natal, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Unknown Island, Western Australia, Austrália.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Edward Hurst родился в 1480 г. в местности комб, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John Hurst II было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Mary Heston, 15. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь от Alice Francis Chamberlin. Он умер в 1539 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности унноун исланд, вестирн аустраля, Австралия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Edward Hurst nació en 1480, en Combe, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John Hurst II, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Lady Mary Heston, tenía 15 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija con Alice Francis Chamberlin. Murió en 1539, en su pueblo, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Unknown Island, Western Australia, Australia.
